results.title: Trump says he expects to host China’s Xi in US around Sept. 24
results.description: WASHINGTON — U.S. President Donald Trump said he expected to meet with Chinese counterpart Xi Jinping around Sept. 24, which would coincide with the UN General Assembly in New York that month. Trump floated the date as he discussed the...

results.title: Right of Reply CPC responds to Verité Research opinion column on pricing
results.description: With reference to the Verité article titled “The price is wrong, twice: Sri Lanka’s fuel is both overpriced and under-priced” published in the Daily FT of 15 June 2026 the Ceylon Petroleum Corporation

results.title: Fewer Oregon bees are dying from pesticides, report shows
results.description: There have been no pesticide-related bee kills in Oregon since 2021, according to a new Oregon State University report — marking a win from more than a decade ago when the state was experiencing an alarming number of dead bees related to pesticides. The inaugural 140-page “Bees of Oregon: 2025” report builds on years of [...]
